meta.description: A bold, dark-themed coffee brand store with a strong, rebellious aesthetic. It uses high contrast, large typography, and edgy imagery targeting a passionate, energetic demographic.

header.notes: Centered circular logo that slightly overlaps the hero section. Navigation links are capitalized and bold. Icon buttons on the right.

footer.notes: Multi-column layout with circular logo on the left. Includes company, accounts, and legal links. Social icons in bottom right.

productCard.notes: Square aspect ratio for images. Title, price, and star ratings aligned left. Add to cart button appears with red border and text on hover/active state.

productGrid.notes: Horizontal scrolling carousel style grid with left/right arrows.

featuredProducts.heading: NEW ARRIVALS
featuredProducts.notes: Carousel layout with red navigation arrows.

design.styling: Thin bar at the very top of the page

content.headline: Promotional offer with call to action

sections.name: hero
sections.layout: Full-bleed background image, text left-aligned, product right-aligned

design.background: Full width image of product setup
design.text: White text, large display serif headline, sans-serif body
design.styling: Dark gradient overlay for text readability

content.headline: Large bold headline promoting a specific product
content.body: Descriptive paragraph about the product bundle
content.cta: 2 buttons: solid red squares with white text side-by-side

media.description: Product packaging and mug on a surface with steam

content.specialElements: Slider dots/arrows at the bottom center

sections.name: new-arrivals

design.styling: Red navigation arrows on left and right

sections.notes: Includes product title, price, and star rating. 'Add to Cart' button visible on one card.

sections.name: featured-logos
sections.layout: Centered heading above a horizontal scrolling strip of logos

design.text: White bold sans-serif overlaid on images
design.styling: Images have dark overlays, white text is centered

sections.name: social-feed
sections.layout: Centered heading, 5-column horizontal scrolling grid of square images/videos

design.text: White heavy serif heading, red text underneath
design.styling: Red navigation arrows, social media icons in top right of items

content.headline: JOIN THE FOLLOWING

media.description: User generated content style photos and videos

content.specialElements: Play button icons on video thumbnails

design.styling: Input and button form a single horizontal line
